➕ Add New Flashcard

📖 Formatting Guide & Tips
📝 Markdown Syntax:
**bold text** | *italic text* | - bullet points
### Heading | `code snippet` | [link](url)

🔢 Math (LaTeX):
Inline math: $x^2 + y^2 = z^2$
Display math: $$\int_{0}^{\infty} e^{-x} dx = 1$$

🖼️ Images:
Paste image URL in the Image field below

💡 Tips:
• Keep questions concise and clear
• Use formatting to highlight key concepts
• Add images for visual learners
📋 Ctrl+V to paste · or click to upload · or enter URL below
